heading: Oversight and accountability of Federal disaster expenditures
label: 793 Oversight and accountability of Federal disaster expenditures

children.heading: Authority of Administrator to designate funds for oversight activities
children.label: a Authority of Administrator to designate funds for oversight activities
children.text: The Administrator may designate up to 1 percent of the total amount provided to a Federal agency for a mission assignment as oversight funds to be used by the recipient agency for performing oversight of activities carried out under the Agency reimbursable mission assignment process. Such funds shall remain available until expended.

children.label: A
children.text: Monitoring, tracking, and auditing expenditures of funds.

children.label: B
children.text: Ensuring that sufficient management and internal control mechanisms are available so that Agency funds are spent appropriately and in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations.

children.label: C
children.text: Reviewing selected contracts and other activities.

children.label: D
children.text: Investigating allegations of fraud involving Agency funds.

children.label: E
children.text: Conducting and participating in fraud prevention activities with other Federal, State, and local government personnel and contractors.

children.heading: Plans and reports
children.label: 2 Plans and reports
children.text: Oversight funds may be used to issue the plans required under subsection (e) and the reports required under subsection (f).

children.heading: Restriction on use of funds
children.label: c Restriction on use of funds
children.text: Oversight funds may not be used to finance existing agency oversight responsibilities related to direct agency appropriations used for disaster response, relief, and recovery activities.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Oversight activities may be carried out by an agency under this section either directly or by contract. Such activities may include evaluations and financial and performance audits.

children.heading: Coordination of oversight activities
children.label: 2 Coordination of oversight activities
children.text: To the extent practicable, evaluations and audits under this section shall be performed by the inspector general of the agency.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If an agency receives oversight funds for a fiscal year, the head of the agency shall prepare a plan describing the oversight activities for disaster response, relief, and recovery anticipated to be undertaken during the subsequent fiscal year.

children.heading: Selection of oversight activities
children.label: 2 Selection of oversight activities
children.text: In preparing the plan, the head of the agency shall select oversight activities based upon a risk assessment of those areas that present the greatest risk of fraud, waste, and abuse.

children.heading: Schedule
children.label: 3 Schedule
children.text: The plan shall include a schedule for conducting oversight activities, including anticipated dates of completion.

children.heading: Federal disaster assistance accountability reports
children.label: f Federal disaster assistance accountability reports
children.text: A Federal agency receiving oversight funds under this section shall submit annually to the Administrator and the appropriate committees of Congress a consolidated report regarding the use of such funds, including information summarizing oversight activities and the results achieved.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: g Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “oversight funds” means funds referred to in subsection (a) that are designated for use in performing oversight activities.
